title: 大阪杯の後に・翼、もがれて

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I couldn't do it... I lost!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I can't believe I thought I could follow in Air
Groove's footsteps. I'm not even at the point
where I can chase after her yet...)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I can't even get close to her, no matter how hard
I try! She's just getting farther and farther away!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I won't be able to accomplish anything at this rate!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(I must become like Air Groove! I can't build a
new legacy if I don't!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... I have to do something!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I want to race in the Takarazuka Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Dober makes her declaration the moment
she returns to the waiting room, her expression
filled with desperation.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
This race made it clear... If I can't win here, how
can I expect to win anywhere else?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
But this isn't the time to be getting depressed. I'm
not the same person I was after the Arima Kinen.
I'm going to keep fighting this battle!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
No doubt Air Groove will be running in the spring
Grand Prix—the Takarazuka Kinen.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
And if that's the case, then I'm running in it too! I
have to face off against her again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I have to figure out what's preventing me from
becoming like her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It's that feeling again...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That same strange sense of unease I've
experienced before rattles loudly in my chest.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
My lips part, and before I know it, a question
spills forth.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Huh? What do you mean?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
There's no point asking her such a thing when I
myself can't put what I'm feeling into words yet.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I need to think this through and find an answer...
Only then can I talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...You're so weird.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In any case, our next goal is decided—she'll be
running the Takarazuka Kinen.
